mdx.body:
# Quickstart

#### A couple brief examples to get you started

So, you've skimmed the overview, maybe the front page or the about section, and kind of know what this is all about. Maybe you've even looked at how to install! Let's start with a few brief examples of the classes in action!

### Fonts and Colors

The framework comes with a few default colors and fonts. Most likely you will want to Customize them to your theme. Let's take a look at the default colors.

The two special colors are white and black. Every other color comes in 5 shades:
